meta.title: Porto Clima — Portable AC in Porto & Metropolitan Area
meta.description: Turnkey portable AC in Porto: fixed from €899, warranted Cecotec heat pump — cool, dehumidify and heat year-round, no outdoor unit on your facade. Same-day install in the AMP.

hero.eyebrow: Porto & Metro Area · historic buildings · no facade work
hero.serviceArea: We serve Porto and the Porto Metropolitan Area (AMP) only
hero.serviceAreaDetail: Porto, Vila Nova de Gaia, Matosinhos, Maia, Gondomar, Valongo, Paredes, Santa Maria da Feira, Espinho, Vila do Conde, Póvoa de Varzim
hero.title: One unit. Four seasons. Fixed price. No outdoor block.
hero.subtitle: Summer cooling, autumn dehumidifying, winter heating — Cecotec heat pump with warranty, fitted and sealed by us. Transparent turnkey from €899. Zero outdoor unit on your facade.
hero.note: €899 / €1,049 / €1,199 turnkey · VAT incl. · 1 day · Porto & AMP

whyBest.title: Why our package beats split, retail and DIY
whyBest.subtitle: We do not sell the cheapest box. We sell year-round comfort — fixed price, reliable machines, dual warranty and install that does not depend on works, condo votes or a block on your balcony.

seasons.title: Summer
seasons.text: Real cooling in 35 °C heatwaves — bedroom at 22–24 °C with a sealed window, no street noise.

seasons.title: Autumn
seasons.text: Dehumidify when Atlantic humidity fills the flat — less mould, less «heavy air».

seasons.title: Winter
seasons.text: Heat pump heating without dry radiators or building works. Essential in Porto without central heating.

seasons.title: Spring
seasons.text: One machine stays ready — no split dismantling or another condo negotiation.

pillars.title: Transparent turnkey price
pillars.text: €899, €1,049 or €1,199 — unit, delivery, survey, fitting and test. No works surprises or shifting quotes.

pillars.title: Reliable machines with warranty
pillars.text: Cecotec ForceClima Soundless only — factory warranty + 12 months on our install. One brand, clear support.

pillars.title: No block on the facade
pillars.text: Nothing hung on the balcony or street. Ideal for Ribeira, rentals and condos that ban outdoor splits.

pillars.title: Same-day install
pillars.text: Survey + fitting + test in the AMP. No weeks waiting for HVAC, assembly votes or building works.

pillars.title: Soundless line
pillars.text: Sleep-first — we measure noise on site, not just brochure dB.

pillars.title: Professional sealing
pillars.text: Value is in the custom window kit — without it, any portable loses 30–40% efficiency in Porto.

whyBest.quote: One unit. Four seasons. One price. Zero facade block.
whyBest.quoteSub: That is what you buy from us — not «another e-commerce SKU».

manifest.title: Our niche — few SKUs, but the right ones
manifest.p1: Monobloc portable AC only — no splits, no forty-brand catalogue. Three Cecotec ForceClima Soundless Heating Connected sizes, all with heat pump, dehumidification and WiFi.
manifest.p2: We chose one manufacturer with a full line on cecotec.pt: transparent PT pricing, same warranty, same support. Simpler than mixing Ballu, Electrolux and Olimpia from different wholesalers.
manifest.p3: Each model covers a real room size — up to 20, 30 or 35–40 m² — with honest limits on what a portable can do. We measure noise on site; we don't repeat brochure dB.
manifest.disclaimer: 3 models because we tested the line — we don't resell everything on the marketplace.

advantages.title: Portable · few SKUs · top tier
advantages.intro: We don't compete with FNAC or Worten on variety. We compete on curation: what works in Porto's historic homes and AMP, with discreet installs and honest numbers.
bullets: Summer cool · autumn dry · winter warm — heat pump on every unit
No outdoor unit — nothing on balcony or facade
Cecotec factory warranty + 12 months on our install
Same-day install in the AMP — survey, sealing and test
Soundless series — sleep with the unit running
advantages.honestCoverage: Honest note — ForceClima 14800: Cecotec lists 28 m²; we recommend up to 35–40 m² in one enclosed room. For larger open spaces: split or a 2-unit package — we never promise 50 m² from one monobloc.
advantages.stockNote: Some SKUs may show «Esgotado» on cecotec.pt — normal for the line. We confirm supplier stock before each install.

pricing.title: Turnkey — fixed price per model
pricing.intro: We don't sell a box from the shop. Each price includes the Cecotec unit, delivery, site survey, same-day install, materials, testing and 12 months install warranty.
pricing.vatNote: VAT included · fixed prices for standard installs in Porto & AMP
includes: Cecotec warranty + 12 months on our install
footnotes: Complex install (thick granite, narrow opening, parquet): +€80–150 — quoted after survey.
Electrical work, unauthorised drilling or travel outside AMP: quoted separately.
50% deposit to book · 50% after install and test.
First 20 requests: priority and these fixed prices before update.

installation.title: How we install — without damaging the facade
installation.subtitle: In listed buildings or strict condominiums, outdoor split units are often impossible. Portable solves with duct and interior finish.

steps.title: Site survey
steps.text: We measure noise, window, airflow and humidity — no phone sales.

steps.title: Discreet penetration (if allowed)
steps.text: Indoor grille + insulated duct — no block on azulejo or granite facade.

steps.title: Finish
steps.text: Decorative flange aligned with frame — before/after photo for condo board.

steps.title: Handover & measurement
steps.text: Short decibel-meter video in night mode — real proof, not brochure.

installation.videoTitle: ForceClima 9500 Soundless Heating Connected — official Cecotec video
installation.videoCaption: Manufacturer video (window kit included). Porto Clima install adds insulated duct, discreet finish and on-site noise measurement.

districts.title: Built for Porto & the metro area
districts.subtitle: We know condo rules, azulejo facades and rental flats across the city and AMP municipalities — we don't install outside this area.

items.name: Porto — Ribeira & Baixa
items.text: Narrow windows, stone walls — we install without touching the riverfront facade.

items.name: Porto — Cedofeita & Bonfim
items.text: Rental flats: mobile setup + landlord letter template.

items.name: Porto — Foz & Nevogilde
items.text: Atlantic humidity — we prioritise dehumidification and heat pump.

items.name: Gaia & Matosinhos
items.text: River and sea front — same approach: portable, no outdoor unit on the facade.

items.name: Maia, Gondomar & Valongo
items.text: Houses and newer flats — technical install with discreet finish.

landlord.title: Renting? We help with your landlord
landlord.text: We provide an authorization request template for discreet drilling — a real barrier we remove for you.

comparison.title: Portable (us) vs split — honest
comparison.subtitle: We won't hide it: split is quieter. But in Greater Porto, condo permits and historic facades matter.

items.a: Cecotec's ForceClima Soundless line covers bedroom, living room and large room — all with heat pump and dehumidification. One manufacturer simplifies warranty, parts and PT pricing on cecotec.pt.
Honestly: portable won't beat split in a bedroom. The Soundless series is our bet for sleeping with the unit on — we measure with a decibel meter on site, not a brochure.
We contact you by email after your request to schedule a survey and install date. First 20 requests: priority and fixed price before update.

items.q: Do I need a company NIF now?
items.a: Not yet — we're validating demand. Contact and room size only. No payment.
Yes — all short-list models have heat pumps. Essential in Porto's shoulder season without central heating.

We operate in Porto and the Porto Metropolitan Area (AMP): Vila Nova de Gaia, Matosinhos, Maia, Gondomar, Valongo, Paredes, Santa Maria da Feira, Espinho, Vila do Conde and Póvoa de Varzim. Outside the AMP — leave a request and we'll review case by case.
For rentals we offer fully mobile window mode plus template letter to request discreet drill approval.

waitlist.title: Request installation
waitlist.subtitle: Leave your details — we'll reply with price, recommended model and timing. First 20 requests: priority and fixed price.
waitlist.name: Name
waitlist.success: Thank you — we'll be in touch soon.
waitlist.privacy: No spam. Data goes to our inbox — we'll contact you about your install.
